summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Evol India Shop app fixes. All 3 requested features working perfectly: branding updated to 'Evol India Shop', case-insensitive search functional, and navigation with 4 pages (Home, Mobiles, Used Phones, Accessories) correctly filtering products by category and condition.
passed_tests: Backend API: All 11 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Branding: 'Evol India Shop' displayed correctly on all pages
Navigation: Home, Mobiles, Used Phones, Accessories menu items present
Home page (/) shows all products (19 found, expected ~18)
Mobiles page (/mobiles) shows new mobile phones only (8 found, expected ~7)
Used Phones page (/used) shows pre-owned items only (6 found, expected ~5)
Accessories page (/accessories) shows accessories only (8 found, expected ~7)
Case-insensitive search: 'iPhone' and 'iphone' both return 6 products
Search functionality filters across all product fields
Admin page: Category field present with Mobile/Accessories options
Backend: Category field returned in inventory API responses
Database: 18 products seeded correctly (11 mobiles, 7 accessories)
Product filtering by category and condition working correctly
Admin CRUD operations working with category field
